name: Agent Loop Guard
description: A deterministic Agent loop guard that updates iteration and capability budget state, classifies capability failures, and emits standard stop reasons.

inputSchema.name: Agent Loop Control
inputSchema.description: Current loop counters, budgets, retry budget, failure counts, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Capability Trace
inputSchema.description: LLM-maintained capability trace from the Buddy loop.

inputSchema.name: Selected Capability
inputSchema.description: The capability that was just executed.

inputSchema.name: Capability Result
inputSchema.description: The raw structured result package from the latest capability execution.

inputSchema.name: Context Budget Report
inputSchema.description: Latest context pressure report, if available.

outputSchema.name: Updated Agent Loop Control
outputSchema.description: Updated loop counters, budgets, retry state, failure counts, and warnings.

outputSchema.name: Agent Loop Report
outputSchema.description: Human-readable audit report for RunDetail and Buddy capsules.

outputSchema.name: Agent Loop Stop Reason
outputSchema.description: A standard stop reason, or empty string when the loop may continue.

outputSchema.name: Should Continue
outputSchema.description: True when the graph should continue to context pressure check and the next selector round.

outputSchema.name: Should Retry
outputSchema.description: True when the latest failure is still inside retry budget.
